decisions.title: Frontend scaffold in apps/web with route groups
decisions.decision: Create the Next.js app in apps/web and use App Router route groups for public, auth, and app surfaces.
decisions.rationale: Keeps root repository clean for shared memory/docs and supports future multi-app expansion.
future_implications: can add worker/api apps without restructuring

decisions.title: Hybrid weekly signature model
decisions.decision: Support both caregiver and patient weekly signatures, captured in caregiver flow and patient portal.
decisions.rationale: Improves flexibility while maintaining compliance-oriented evidence capture.
constraints: both signatures required unless policy exception

decisions.title: Copy policy excludes signatures and GPS
decisions.decision: Copy previous day/week can copy only allowed routine fields and task patterns; signatures, GPS, approvals, and incident fields are never copied.
decisions.rationale: Prevents fraudulent carryover and preserves event integrity.

decisions.title: Admin edits are revision-based
decisions.decision: Submitted forms are immutable; admin edits generate a new revision record with audit metadata.
decisions.rationale: Ensures audit trail integrity and legal defensibility.

decisions.title: Effective-date authorization rules
decisions.decision: Authorization changes apply forward from effective date; historical submissions remain valid against active-at-time rules.
decisions.rationale: Avoids retroactive invalidation and keeps historical truth consistent.
future_implications: backdated corrections may require policy gate

decisions.title: Exception visibility for admin and case manager
decisions.decision: Both healthcare admin and case manager can access exception review queues with role-scoped assignments.
decisions.rationale: Supports care continuity and timely issue resolution.
constraints: tenant isolation and patient assignment boundaries

decisions.title: GPS offline fallback context capture
decisions.decision: When GPS confidence is low/offline, capture available context and compare later to patient address policy.
decisions.rationale: Maintains workflow continuity without dropping compliance evidence.
constraints: manual override reason where policy allows
future_implications: confidence scoring and fraud model inputs

decisions.title: Caregiver daily draft and weekly submit lifecycle
decisions.decision: Caregiver saves drafts daily and performs weekly submit after required review and signatures.
decisions.rationale: Matches real field operations and reduces end-of-week data loss.
future_implications: offline autosave and merge conflict handling
